description:
Returns a list of Coordination Issues that have associated workflow metadata.
Issues are filtered based on user visibility rules:
- Project Admins can see all workflow issues
- Issue creators can see issues they created
- Issue assignees can see issues assigned to them
- Workflow members can see issues for workflows they are part of

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the company.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the project.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Elements per page

parameters.name: filters[assignee_company_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching assignee vendor companies.

parameters.name: filters[assignee_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching assignee user IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) created by the specified User IDs

parameters.name: filters[created_from]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) by creation source.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Filter by specific Coordination Issue IDs.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Filters by specific location (Note: Use *either* this or location_id_with_sublocations, but not both)

parameters.name: filters[include_sublocations]
parameters.description: Use together with `filters[location_id]`

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified search query string.

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified statuses

parameters.name: filters[issue_type]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) by issue type.

parameters.name: filters[priority]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) by priority level.

parameters.name: filters[trade_id]
parameters.description: Trade ID

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[due_date]
parameters.description: Filter Coordination Issues by due date.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort results by field. Direction (asc/desc) controlled by presence or absence of '-' prefix.

parameters.name: filters[overdue]
parameters.description: Filter for overdue Coordination Issues.

parameters.name: filters[document_container_id]
parameters.description: Filter Coordination Issues by document container ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[document_revision_id]
parameters.description: Filter Coordination Issues by document revision ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[source_file_id]
parameters.description: Filter by source BIM file ID

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Specifies the view to use for the response. Use 'normal' for basic fields, 'extended' for full details including viewpoints and attachments.

parameters.name: viewpoint_format
parameters.description: Specifies the format for viewpoint data. Use 'procore' for Procore format, 'bcf' for BCF format.

parameters.name: included
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

data.description: Array of Coordination Issues with workflow metadata

id.description: Unique identifier for the Coordination Issue

title.description: Title of the Coordination Issue (max 80 characters)

creation_source.description: Source from which the issue was created

due_date.description: Due date of the Coordination Issue

closed_date.description: Date when the issue was closed

issue_type.description: Issue type of the Coordination Issue

coordination_issue_file.description: BIM file associated with the issue

drawing_revision.description: Drawing revision linked to the issue

origin.description: Origin source for the Coordination Issue

updated_by.description: User who last updated the issue

linked_procore_items.description: Procore items linked to the Coordination Issue

linked_drawings.description: Details of drawings linked to Coordination Issue

linked_observation_items.description: Observation items linked to the Coordination Issue

drawing_markup_preview_images.description: Preview images generated by drawings with Coordination Issue Pin

custom_fields.description: Custom fields associated with the Coordination Issue

permissions.description: Permission flags for the current user on this Coordination Issue.

403.description: User does not have permission to view Coordination Issues
